howItWorks.intro: This yarn yardage calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Skeins
rules.explanation: Total yardage divided by what each skein provides.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.q: How much yarn for a blanket?
faq.a: A throw blanket needs 1400-4000 yards depending on yarn weight.
Always buy 10-15% extra to account for gauge differences and mistakes.
